docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SORTO, EDWARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GURR, FRED $2,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,650.00, CONCURRENTLY WITH THE PAYMENT OF THIS JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF SHALL RETURN TO DEFENDANT AT 862 PERU AVENUE, SF CA 94112, THE FOLLOWING PROPERTY:--A 1989 FORD MUSTANG, LICENSE # 6 VIS 180. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT GURR, FRED MAILED TO RESPONDENT SORTO, EDWARD

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT SORTO, EDWARD TAKE NOTHING FROM APPELLANT GURR, FRED RESPONDENT DID NOT PROVE (1) A TRANSMISSION PROBLEM OR (2) THE VALUE OF REPAIRING THE TRANSMISSION OR THE REDUCTION IN VALUE TO THE CAR WITH A TRANSMISSION PROBLEM. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF APR-18-2014. EXHIBITS ARE ORDERED RETURNED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SORTO, EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT GURR, FRED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-18-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-05-2014 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: PLAINTIFF EDWARD SORTO. ADDRESS CHECKED.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY GURR, FRED SORTO, EDWARD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE) SERVED MAR-19-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GURR, FRED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-18-2014 - JUDGMENT.
RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: PLTF EDWARD SORTO. ADDRESS CHECKED.
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO RESPONDENT ON JUNE 5, 2014. ENVELOPE STAMPED, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD"
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR JUN-05-2014 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUN-05-2014 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. FRED GURR DOES NOT OWE EDWARD SORTO ANY MONEY. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF APR-18-14. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. JUDGE PRO TEM ELLIOTT MYLES, CLERK WESLEY RAMIREZ. NOTHING REPORTED. DEPARTMENT 525.
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-18-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-18-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
